name: mcp-server-document
summary: MCP server for academic document authoring: grant proposals (科研費/JSPS), journal papers (IEEE/IEEJ/APS/Elsevier), research-talk slides + a raster-to-Excalidraw diagram pipeline. 46 diagnostic tools + knowledge base distilled from 14 classical Japanese/English writing-technique books (木下/本多/Wallwork/Sato et al.). 0.3.0 adds acronym-first-use detection and notation-variant (表記ゆれ) consistency checking for jargon-heavy technical proposals.
